---
title: "v9b_songunet_bridge"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.version-page}
::: {.version-hero}
<span class="version-label">v9b / diffusion bridge</span>

# v9b_songunet_bridge

This version keeps the SongUNet backbone but starts the generative trajectory from a noisy CNO field instead of pure
Gaussian noise.
:::

::: {.version-layout}
::: {.version-main}
## Hypothesis

The bridge starts close to the deterministic state:

$$
\mathbf{x}_0=\boldsymbol{\mu}+\sigma(\boldsymbol{\mu})\epsilon,\qquad \mathbf{x}_1=\mathbf{x}_{HR}.
$$

This should keep sampling physically closer to the observed LR-conditioned ocean than a pure noise-to-HR path.

{{< include _variable-results.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.version-side}
## Parameters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Backbone | SongUNet / NCSN++ |
| Objective | stochastic bridge |
| Start state | `mu + sigma(mu) * eps` |
| Target | HR direct |
| Patch size | `256` |

## References

- [Diffusion bridge](../methods/bridge.html)
- Stochastic interpolants
:::
:::
:::
